title: May God Forgive You... But I Won't
actors: George Ardisson, Dragomir Bojanic-Gidra, Cristina Iosani
plot: While Cjamango is away from his ranch six bandits attack and kill all the members of his family. Disrupted by this tragedy he sets out to take his revenge. One by one he kills the bandits and learns along the way that a relative o...
